cases.question: For active users who have rated at least 3 movies, which films did they give a perfect 5-star rating to? Show each user alongside their personal list of top-rated movies.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (u:User)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie)
WITH u, count(m) AS totalRated, collect({title: m.title, rating: r.rating}) AS allRatings
WHERE totalRated >= 3
WITH u, [x IN allRatings WHERE x.rating = 5.0 | x.title] AS perfectMovies
WHERE size(perfectMovies) > 0
RETURN u.name AS user, u.userId AS userId, perfectMovies AS topRatedMovies
ORDER BY u.name
LIMIT 25

cases.question: What movies would you recommend to User 1 based on what similar users enjoyed? Suggest films that User 1 hasn't seen yet but were highly rated by people with overlapping tastes. Show the top 10.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
// Step 1: collect movies User 1 has already seen
MATCH (u1:User {userId: '1'})-[:RATED]->(seen:Movie)
WITH u1, collect(seen) AS seenMovies

// Step 2: find similar users via shared rated movies, count overlap
MATCH (u1)-[:RATED]->(shared:Movie)<-[:RATED]-(similar:User)
WHERE similar <> u1
WITH u1, seenMovies, similar, count(shared) AS overlap

// Step 3: collect highly-rated unseen movies from similar users
//         weight each rating by how much overlap that user shares with User 1
MATCH (similar)-[r:RATED]->(rec:Movie)
WHERE NOT rec IN seenMovies
  AND r.rating >= 3.5
WITH rec,
     sum(r.rating * overlap)    AS weightedScore,
     count(DISTINCT similar)    AS numRecommenders,
     avg(r.rating)              AS avgSimilarRating
ORDER BY weightedScore DESC
LIMIT 10
RETURN rec.title               AS title,
       rec.imdbRating          AS imdbRating,
       numRecommenders         AS recommendedBy,
       round(avgSimilarRating, 2) AS avgSimilarRating,
       round(weightedScore, 2) AS score

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: For each genre, what are the five best-reviewed movies based on IMDb ratings? Show each genre with its top 5 film titles.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (g:Genre)
WITH g,
     COLLECT {
       MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g)
       WHERE m.imdbRating IS NOT NULL
       RETURN m.title
       ORDER BY m.imdbRating DESC
       LIMIT 5
     } AS topMovies
RETURN g.name AS genre, topMovies
ORDER BY g.name

cases.question: What are the top 5 movies I should recommend to User 534? Base it on what users with similar viewing histories rated highly, excluding anything User 534 has already seen.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (u:User {userId: '534'})-[:RATED]->(seen:Movie)
WITH u, collect(seen) AS seenMovies

MATCH (u)-[:RATED]->(m:Movie)<-[:RATED]-(similar:User)
WHERE similar <> u
WITH u, seenMovies, similar, count(m) AS sharedMovies
ORDER BY sharedMovies DESC
LIMIT 50

MATCH (similar)-[r:RATED]->(rec:Movie)
WHERE NOT rec IN seenMovies
  AND r.rating >= 3.5
WITH rec,
     avg(r.rating)   AS avgRating,
     count(r)        AS ratingCount
ORDER BY avgRating DESC, ratingCount DESC
LIMIT 5
RETURN rec.title    AS title,
       round(avgRating * 100) / 100 AS avgRating,
       ratingCount  AS ratedByCount

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Which people in our database have both acted in and directed movies? For each, show how many films they've acted in and how many they've directed.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (p:Person)
WHERE EXISTS { (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(:Movie) }
  AND EXISTS { (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(:Movie) }
WITH p,
     COUNT { (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(:Movie) } AS actedCount,
     COUNT { (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(:Movie) } AS directedCount
RETURN p.name AS person, actedCount, directedCount
ORDER BY directedCount DESC, actedCount DESC

RETURN movie.title AS title, movie.plot AS plot, movie.imdbRating AS imdbRating,
       round(score, 4) AS similarity
ORDER BY similarity DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: What are the top 10 movies to recommend to User 1, factoring in both what similar users enjoyed and whether the movie's genres match their viewing history? Weight peer ratings more heavily than genre overlap.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (u:User {userId: '1'})-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre)
WITH u, collect(DISTINCT g.name) AS myGenres, collect(DISTINCT m) AS seen
UNWIND seen AS seenMovie
MATCH (peer:User)-[pr:RATED]->(seenMovie)
WHERE peer <> u AND pr.rating >= 4
WITH u, myGenres, seen, peer, count(seenMovie) AS overlap
WHERE overlap >= 3
MATCH (peer)-[pr2:RATED]->(rec:Movie)
WHERE pr2.rating >= 4 AND NOT rec IN seen
OPTIONAL MATCH (rec)-[:IN_GENRE]->(rg:Genre)
WITH rec, myGenres,
     avg(pr2.rating) AS peerAvg,
     count(DISTINCT peer) AS peerCount,
     collect(DISTINCT rg.name) AS recGenres
WITH rec, peerAvg, peerCount, recGenres, myGenres,
     size([g IN recGenres WHERE g IN myGenres]) AS genreMatches,
     size(recGenres) AS totalGenres
WITH rec, peerAvg, peerCount, genreMatches, totalGenres,
     round(
       0.7 * (peerAvg / 5.0) +
       0.3 * CASE WHEN totalGenres > 0 THEN toFloat(genreMatches) / totalGenres ELSE 0 END,
     3) AS score
RETURN rec.title AS movie,
       rec.imdbRating AS imdbRating,
       round(peerAvg, 2) AS avgPeerRating,
       peerCount,
       genreMatches + '/' + totalGenres AS genreOverlap,
       score
ORDER BY score DESC, peerCount DESC
LIMIT 10

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

WHERE u1 <> u2
